title: Geraniospermum ceratophyllum
taxonomy: Geraniospermum ceratophyllum is a genus in the plant family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other plant families such as Rubiaceae and Loganiaceae. The order Gentianales is part of the clade Asterids in the larger group of flowering plants, known as angiosperms. Angiosperms are further divided into two main groups: monocots and dicots.
